name: Shrimp Chinese Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound raw shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heated pan, combine shrimp, sherry, cornstarch, and salt. Cook and stir until the shrimp turns pink (no longer). Set aside.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in another pan. Add chopped celery and stir rapidly for 2 minutes.
3. Add salt and sugar to the celery mixture. Continue stirring.
4. Add mushrooms and green sprouts to the pan, cooking for an additional 3 minutes.
5. Mix in the cooked shrimp into the celery mixture. Drain well using a colander.
6. Fill commercial egg rolls with the prepared filling on a diagonal, rolling up tightly and sealing the ends.
7. Fry the egg rolls in hot grease until crispy.
8. Serve with rice and topping for rolls of apricot jam and hot mustard. Dilute jam with water before serving.
By "Diane. Geary"  on Dec 20, 1997.
